title: NPS ranger-led walk at Bartlett Cove
description: A National Park Service ranger leads visitors on a guided walk through the Sitka spruce rainforest at Bartlett Cove, the headquarters area of Glacier Bay National Park.
alt: A National Park Service ranger leading a group of visitors on a guided forest walk at Bartlett Cove
